description.value:
A mace fitted with multiple steel flanges that slice through gaps in armor. Equally effective at battering shields and shearing mail rings.

Training Levels

LevelProperties
UntrainedOne-Handed, Melee d4, Bludgeoning
BasicOne-Handed, Melee d6, Bludgeoning or Slashing, Punch, Sunder
MasterOne-Handed, Melee d6, Bludgeoning or Slashing, Punch, Sunder (enhanced), Powerful Blow
Master PerkSunder always reduces the target's AC by 2 on a failed save. A Powerful Blow automatically triggers a Sunder effect without requiring a save.

rmeData.masterPerk: Sunder always reduces the target's AC by 2. A Powerful Blow automatically applies the Sunder effect without a save.
